package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "sync"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for mutex_value_receiver: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `func (s MyStruct) Method()` where `MyStruct` contains a `sync.Mutex` or `sync.RWMutex` field
type CaseMutexValueReceiverDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMutexValueReceiverModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMutexValueReceiverRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMutexValueReceiverModel
}

type CaseMutexValueReceiverService struct {
    repo *CaseMutexValueReceiverRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMutexValueReceiverAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveMutexValueReceiver(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMutexValueReceiverDTO) error {
    focus := "mutex_value_receiver"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    var mu sync.Mutex
    for _, item := range items { mu.Lock(); _ = item.ID; defer mu.Unlock() }
    mutex_value_receiver_positive := map[string]int{"mutex": 1, "value": 2, "receiver": 3}
    mutex_value_receiver_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    mutex_positive_0 := mutex_value_receiver_positive["mutex"] + len(input)
    _ = mutex_positive_0
    value_positive_1 := mutex_value_receiver_positive["value"] + len(input)
    _ = value_positive_1
    receiver_positive_2 := mutex_value_receiver_positive["receiver"] + len(input)
    _ = receiver_positive_2
    return nil
}
